description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs: push_github in the deploy stage that runs a curl command to download init.sh from the ludeeus toolbox and pipes it to bash with arguments github HA-Custom_components root /brewdog, then runs another curl to download push.sh and pipes it to bash with argument Europe/Oslo; and update_readme in the build stage that runs a curl POST request to the GitLab API triggering a pipeline, sending the $README_TOKEN as token, ref=master and variable single_repo=brewdog. No specific Docker image or services are defined, so the default runner image is used. The pipeline does not define caches, artifacts, or rules, and only uses the $README_TOKEN secret.
